content.problemStatement:
Given a string s representing a positive integer, round it to the nearest multiple of 10. If two multiples of 10 are equally distant from the number, choose the smaller one.


Input Format

First line contains TTT, the number of test cases
Next TTT lines contain a string


Output Format

For each test case, print the rounded number as a string.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1: 29 is closer to 30 than 20 
Test Case 2: 15 is equally distant from 10 and 20, choose smaller (10) 
Test Case 3: 42 is closer to 40 than 50 
Test Case 4: 95 rounds to 90 as per given problem solution
